Start building on BEAM now!

As money evolves, we think it's important for Visa's network and solutions to evolve with it to ensure that new forms of money can be transacted in a secure and convenient manner. Especially for the Web3 gaming industry.

Cuy Sheffield
Head of Crypto, Visa

This is a great example of how digital assets can be a force for good, delivering humanitarian assistance to the most vulnerable in need with real-time speed and accountability of usage of funds.

Carmen Hett
Treasurer, UNHCR

USDC on Solana facilitates instant, global, sustainable payment rails for everyone, which makes it simple for developers looking to make their next big idea come to life.

Anatoly Yakovenko
Co-founder and CEO at Solana Labs

Millions of people across Latin America and Africa depend on Airtm to access earning opportunities paid in digital dollars, so that they can bring stable money home. USDC allows us to offer them that; and with speed, reliability and transparency.

Lisa Nestor
Chief Strategy Officer, Airtm
